name: How to add your business to ratemds.com
description: Learn how to boost your online presence by adding your business profile to ratemds.com. Follow our step-by-step guide for easy setup and increased visibility.
main_title: How to add your business to ratemds.com
richtext:
What is Ratemds.com and why is it important?

RateMDs.com is a website where patients rate and review doctors. Physicians can benefit from having an account on the website to monitor and respond to reviews, attract new patients, and get valuable feedback to improve patient care.

‍

Step-by-step guide to add your business to Ratemds.com

‍

  1. Go to the RateMDs.com website
  1. Click on "Doctors" or "Dentists" in the top menu, depending on your business type
  1. Click on "Add a Doctor" or "Add a Dentist" button located at the top of the page.
  1. Enter the name of the doctor you are looking for to search our database.
  1. If the doctor is not found, please scroll down and click 'Create a New Doctor
  1. Fill out the required information about primary practice, including the name, specialty, address, phone number, and website.
  1. After submitting your profile, ratemds.com requires 2 business days to review and approve it before it is published.
  1. Confirm your email address by clicking on the link in the confirmation email that RateMDs.com sends you.
  1. Once your profile gets approved, You can then edit, add photos, and respond to patient reviews.

‍
